nav.communityHelpHint: Open a ticket or browse the help center.

footer.tagline: An MGM Laboratory product. Built for the lab, by the lab.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyBody: We'll let you know when there's something new.

authError.defaultTitle: Something went wrong signing you in
authError.defaultBody: We couldn't complete that sign-in. Try again, or head back to the About page to read more about MGM Asset Library.
authError.sessionExpiredBody: For your security we ended your session. Sign back in to pick up where you left off.
authError.unauthenticatedBody: That page is gated behind sign-in. Authenticate with Keycloak and you'll be redirected back.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that.
notFound.body: The page you were looking for moved, was archived, or never existed. Try the discovery feed or run a search.

errors.boundaryBody: Something on our side broke. We've logged it. You can try the same action again, or head back to the homepage.
errors.assetLoadBody: We couldn't reach the asset right now. Try again, or go back to Discover.

shell.discoverPlaceholderBody: This is the authenticated shell — the navbar, the locale switcher, the notification bell, the profile menu, and the footer all wire up here. The Discover hero, category rows, and the infinite feed ship next.

discover.featuredEnd: You've reached the end of featured assets.
discover.emptyBody: Try a different sort or come back after Contributors publish.

package.emptyTree: No files in this version yet.

compatibility.requiresEmptyProjectBody: This asset must be installed into an empty project. Existing project assets may be overwritten.

asset.commentsStub: Comments load in Part 3. Coming soon.
asset.localeFallback: This asset is only available in {locale}. Showing {locale} version.

viewer.noPreview: No preview available for this version.
viewer.noAnimations: This model has no embedded animations.

download.title: Download — {asset}
download.subtitle: Choose what you'd like to download. We'll start it automatically.
download.noFiles: No downloadable files in this version.
download.thankYouBody: If your download didn't start automatically, {link}.
download.failedBody: Try again in a moment. If it keeps happening, the file may be quarantined.

share.title: Share this asset
share.intro: Anyone with this link who has access to the library can open it.

report.title: Report this asset
report.intro: Reports go to MGM admins for review. False reports may affect your standing.
report.notesPlaceholder: Steps to reproduce, observed behaviour, file names…
report.submitted: Report submitted. Thanks for letting us know.
report.rateLimited: You've submitted too many reports today. Please try again tomorrow.

library.title: My Library
library.subtitle: Assets you've saved or downloaded.
library.emptyBody: Save or download assets to find them here.

search.title: All assets
search.endOfResults: You've reached the end of results.
search.emptyBody: Try removing a filter, or broaden your keywords.

dev.playgroundBody: Every primitive in the design system, in one place. Only mounted outside production.

admin.title: Admin
admin.auditPurge: Audit logs older than 30 days are automatically purged.

featured.cap: Featured slot cap is 5. Deactivate another slot first.
featured.missingLocalized: Provide a short description in both languages.

users.lastAdmin: Cannot demote the last remaining admin.

profile.devicesBody: These are the Unity / Unreal editors you've signed in from. Revoke any you no longer use.
profile.revokeConfirmBody: The plugin will sign out immediately. You can re-authenticate it from inside Unity or Unreal later.
profile.accountBody: Signing out also revokes the active Keycloak session.

errorPages.forbiddenTitle: You don't have access to this page.
errorPages.forbiddenBody: If you think this is a mistake, contact a lab admin.

publish.title: Publish
publish.subtitle: Share Unity, Unreal, and engine-agnostic assets with the lab.
publish.leaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

empty.title: Share your work with the lab.
empty.body: Publish your first asset to make it discoverable to the team and partners.

newDraft.title: Start a new asset
newDraft.body: We'll create a draft you can keep editing — nothing is public until you press Publish.
newDraft.engineImmutable: Engine can't be changed after publish.

basics.title: Asset title
basics.titleHelper: Show your work. Concise, no marketing fluff.
basics.slugHelper: Used in the public asset URL.

media.thumbnailDrop: Drop an image here or click to browse
media.previewMediaHelper: Add images, videos, audio, and 3D models that should appear in the asset gallery.

files.title: Asset package files
files.subtitle: Upload the files that make up this asset. Folder drops keep their structure.
files.drop: Drop files or a folder here
files.requiresEmptyProjectLabel: This asset must be installed into an empty project
files.requiresEmptyProjectHint: We'll show a warning on the asset detail page so users don't overwrite their work.

av.warningTitle: Antivirus flagged one or more files
av.warningBody: You can still publish, but admins will be notified.

description.shortHelper: One-line summary, up to 280 chars. Multi-language.
description.fallbackNote: This language is empty. Public users in this locale will see the English version as fallback.

compatibility.title: Engine compatibility
compatibility.noRows: Add the engines and pipelines your asset supports.
compatibility.agnostic: Compatibility is not required for engine-agnostic assets.

tagsStep.title: Tags
tagsStep.subtitle: Help people find your asset. Type to search existing tags or create a new one with Enter.
tagsStep.tooMany: That's a lot of tags. Consider trimming to keep search relevant.

licenseStep.title: License
licenseStep.subtitle: Pick the license that protects you and matches your intent.

review.title: Review
review.subtitle: One last check. Nothing is public until you publish.
review.publishingNote: Publishing makes this asset discoverable to everyone with library access.

manageView.title: Manage
manageView.subtitle: Your published, draft, and archived assets in one place.
manageView.deleteConfirmBody: This soft-deletes the asset. Files are purged after 30 days. Type the asset title to confirm.
manageView.archiveConfirmBody: Archived assets disappear from Discover and Search. You can restore within 30 days.

newVersionPage.title: New version
newVersionPage.subtitle: Bump the semver, write release notes, and upload the new package.
newVersionPage.semverHigher: Semver must be higher than the latest published version.

request.title: Request an asset
request.subtitle: Ask the admins to source an asset on your behalf.
request.rateLimited: You've submitted too many requests today. Try again tomorrow.
request.emptyBody: Need an asset that's not here? Send the admins a request.

form.name: Name
form.assetLinkHelper: Paste a URL to the asset you want sourced.
form.assetTypeHelper: e.g. Unity 3D model, Unreal blueprint, Texture pack
form.intendedUseHelper: What will you use it for? Min 20 chars.

request.noSelection: Pick a request to see its details.

comments.heading: Comments
comments.issueBanner: Issues are tracked separately and the contributor can mark them as resolved.
comments.newCommentsBanner: {count} new comments. Click to see them.
comments.emptyBody: Be the first to share feedback on this asset.

notif.heading: Notifications
notif.emptyBody: When something happens that needs your attention, we'll list it here.

type.AV_INFECTED_WARNING: Antivirus flagged a file in your upload of {asset}
type.ADMIN_PROMOTED: You were promoted to admin by {by}
type.ADMIN_DEMOTED: Your admin role was revoked by {by}
